calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination Of Trust Existence And Terms And For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nathan Borris appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court informed Mr. Borris of its intent to go with option number 2 and characterize the 2017 Trust as a new trust and confirm the real property, the partnership interest, the stocks and the bank account as assets of the 2017 Trust. The Petition for Determination of Trust Existence and Terms and for Order Confirming Trust Assets is under submission.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: E. Melendez. Not reported.

Petition For Determination Of Trust Existence And Terms And For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Sep-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
